name: Feature Request

labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Proposed Command or Feature

Describe the command, flag, or behavior you'd like to see.

```bash
# Example usage
torii <proposed-command> <args>
```

## Use Case

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Related Torii API Endpoint(s)

Which API endpoint(s) does this relate to? (Check `docs/api-reference/endpoints/`)

- `METHOD /path` —

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other information, screenshots, or references.
